phase1.output:
=== Project: Core Loop Complete ===
🎯 Goal: Build a complete core loop

--- Core Loop Checklist ---
✅ Player moves
✅ Player jumps
✅ Player can collect items
✅ Player can take damage
✅ Player can reach the goal
✅ Score updates
✅ Health updates
✅ Game over state
✅ Win state

--- Implementation ---
Scripts needed:
  • PlayerController (movement, jump)
  • PlayerHealth (health, damage)
  • ScoreManager (score tracking)
  • Collectible (items to collect)
  • Enemy (basic AI)
  • Goal (win condition)
  • GameManager (game state)

--- Testing ---
✅ Test movement
✅ Test jumping
✅ Test collecting
✅ Test damage
✅ Test goal
✅ Test game over
✅ Test win
phase1.explanation:
🎮 **Project checkpoint — Core Loop Complete**

**At this point, students should have:**
- A working player controller
- Health and damage systems
- Collectibles with score
- Basic enemies
- A goal to reach
- Game over and win states

**Sharp-chan says:**
"The core loop is the foundation of your game. Make it solid."

phase2.errorMessage: (No error — but the game is a mess because features were added too early.)

phase3.prompt:
What should you complete before adding extra features?

A) The core loop  
B) The menu  
C) The settings  
D) The credits

Select the CORRECT answer.
dialogueHints: Think about what makes the game playable.
